name: Monkey Forward
short_description: Race through cherry tree seasons as a speedy monkey collecting honey and dodging obstacles in this thrilling endless run Indie game but with advanced gameplay.
detailed_description:
Indie Endless run Game but with advanced gameplay, get ready for high-speed excitement with "Monkey Forward"! Join our adventurous monkey as it dashes through the cherry tree seasons filled with honey in this thrilling endless run game. Speed through dynamic levels, collecting honey and dodging obstacles along the way. The ultimate challenge awaits at the end:
Can you keep up and beat the big boss, the Bee Queen?

Key Features:
Intense Speed: Experience adrenaline-pumping action as you dash through levels at breakneck speed.
Endless Thrills: Enjoy non-stop fun with procedurally generated levels that keep the excitement fresh every time you play.
Honey Collection: Gather honey to unlock power-ups, upgrades, and exclusive rewards to aid you on your journey.
Epic Boss Battle: Test your skills in an epic final encounter with the mighty Bee Queen.
